title: Created Ender Storage
description: Created Ender Storage is an Resource Pack that updates the textures of this incredible mod made by Covers1624, Chicken_bones and EcuTruin with the textures of another incredible mod by Simibubi.
body:
Created Ender Storage is my third Resource Pack that updates the textures of this incredible mod made by Covers1624, Chicken_bones and EcuTruin with the textures of another incredible mod by Simibubi.


ALL textures credits go to the creators of both mod!


The Resourcepack modifies the original textures of the Ender Storage mod and adds new textures that fit better with Steampunk mods like create and Immersive Engineering.
